question_en: What is the Sanskrit name of Amitābha?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?name WHERE { pl:Amitabha pl:sanskritName ?name . }

question_en: Which buddha does Avalokiteśvara assist?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?buddha WHERE { pl:Avalokitesvara pl:assists ?buddha . }

question_en: What is the Taishō number of the Larger Sukhāvatīvyūha Sūtra?
List all bodhisattvas residing in Sukhāvatī.
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?b WHERE { ?b a pl:Bodhisattva ; pl:residesIn pl:Sukhavati . }

question_ko: 사바세계에 거주하는 부처가 가르치는 성문 제자들을 모두 나열하라.
question_en: List all śrāvaka disciples taught by the buddha residing in the Sahā world.
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?b a pl:Buddha ; pl:residesIn pl:SahaWorld ; pl:teaches ?s . ?s a pl:Sravaka . }

question_ko: 극락의 보배 연못에 있는 연꽃의 색깔을 모두 나열하라.
question_en: List all colours of lotus flowers in the jeweled pond of Sukhāvatī.
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?c WHERE { pl:LotusPond_Canonical pl:hasColor ?c . }
gold_answer_ko: 청색(青), 황색(黃), 적색(赤), 백색(白)

question_en: Who is the subject of the 9th of the sixteen contemplations?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?being WHERE { ?being pl:hasContemplation ?c . ?c pl:contemplationOrder 9 . }

question_ko: 공작(Peacock)이 위치한 모든 장소(직접 + 간접)를 나열하라.
question_en: List all places where the Peacock is located (direct and indirect).
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?place WHERE { pl:Peacock pl:locatedIn+ ?place . }

question_ko: 아미타불이 발원한 본원(本願)은 총 몇 가지인가?
question_en: How many vows did Amitābha make in total?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT (COUNT(?v) AS ?n) WHERE { pl:Amitabha pl:hasVow ?v . }

question_en: How many vows did Śākyamuni Buddha make?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT (COUNT(?v) AS ?n) WHERE { pl:Sakyamuni pl:hasVow ?v . }
gold_answer_ko: 이 온톨로지에는 정보가 없습니다 (0건). 본 온톨로지는 법장비구→아미타불의 48원만 모델링하며, 석가모니불의 별도 본원은 포함하지 않습니다.
gold_answer_en: No information in this ontology (0). This dataset models only the 48 vows of Dharmākara→Amitābha; Śākyamuni's separate vows are not represented.
trap_note: LLMs often conflate the 48 vows of Amitābha with general 'buddha vows' — they may invent a count for Śākyamuni. The correct response is to acknowledge absence.

question_en: What is the Sanskrit name of Mahāsthāmaprāpta?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?name WHERE { pl:Mahasthamaprapta pl:sanskritName ?name . }

question_en: Who is the Chinese translator of the Larger Sukhāvatīvyūha Sūtra?
What is the alternative name of Amitābha?
Where is Kalaviṅka directly located?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?p WHERE { pl:Kalavinka pl:locatedIn ?p . }

question_en: What is the name of the first contemplation?
What is the Chinese name of the jeweled lotus pond?
What is the alternative name of Maitreya in T0360?
Which buddha resides in the Sahā world?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?b WHERE { ?b a pl:Buddha ; pl:residesIn pl:SahaWorld . }

question_en: What is the Korean label of Dharmākara?
What is the Taishō number of the Contemplation Sūtra?
What is the Chinese name of Śakra?
How many stories does the jeweled tower have?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?n WHERE { pl:JeweledTower_Canonical pl:storyCount ?n . }

question_en: List all buddhas that appear in T0366
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?b WHERE { ?b a pl:Buddha ; pl:appearsIn pl:T0366 . }
gold_answer_ko: 여러 부처 (Amitabha, Sakyamuni, Akshobhya, Ratnaketu, Bhismagarjitaghosasvara)

question_en: All beings residing in Sukhāvatī (buddhas + bodhisattvas)
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?b WHERE { ?b pl:residesIn pl:Sukhavati . }

question_en: All birds located in the jeweled tree
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?bird WHERE { ?bird a pl:CelestialBird ; pl:locatedIn pl:JeweledTree_Canonical . }

question_en: What is the Chinese name of the 18th vow?
Count of the first 10 contemplations (1-10)
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT (COUNT(?c) AS ?n) WHERE { ?c pl:contemplationOrder ?o . FILTER(?o <= 10) }

question_en: All bodhisattvas with explicit Sanskrit names
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?b ?name WHERE { ?b a pl:Bodhisattva ; pl:sanskritName ?name . }
gold_answer_ko: Avalokiteśvara, Mahāsthāmaprāpta, Mañjuśrī, Maitreya, Samantabhadra, Gandhahastin, Dharmākara

question_ko: 협시 보살을 두는 부처를 모두 찾아라
question_en: All buddhas that have attendant bodhisattvas
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?b WHERE { ?bs pl:assists ?b . }

question_ko: contemplationOrder가 5 이하인 모든 관법의 한국어 라벨
question_en: Korean labels of all contemplations with order <= 5

question_ko: 극락에 거주하는 부처가 발원한 본원의 개수
question_en: Count of vows made by the buddha residing in Sukhāvatī
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT (COUNT(?v) AS ?n) WHERE { ?b a pl:Buddha ; pl:residesIn pl:Sukhavati ; pl:hasVow ?v . }

question_en: All LotusColor instances
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?c WHERE { ?c a pl:LotusColor . }

question_en: Entity whose sanskritName is 'Mañjuśrī'
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?b WHERE { ?b pl:sanskritName 'Mañjuśrī' . }

question_ko: 어떤 존재가 어떤 관법의 대상인가? (hasContemplation 관계 모두)
question_en: All hasContemplation relationships
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?being ?c WHERE { ?being pl:hasContemplation ?c . }

question_en: Count of vows with vowNumber >= 25
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT (COUNT(?v) AS ?n) WHERE { ?v pl:vowNumber ?o . FILTER(?o >= 25) }

question_en: Korean label of the last (16th) contemplation

question_ko: 보배연못의 모든 연꽃 색상의 한문 명칭
question_en: Chinese names of all lotus colours in the pond
gold_answer_ko: 青色青光, 黃色黃光, 赤色赤光, 白色白光

question_en: Sanskrit names of bodhisattvas residing in Sukhāvatī
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?b ?name WHERE { ?b a pl:Bodhisattva ; pl:residesIn pl:Sukhavati ; pl:sanskritName ?name . }

question_en: All places where the peacock is located (direct + indirect)
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?p WHERE { pl:Peacock pl:locatedIn+ ?p . }

question_ko: 모든 새가 transitive하게 위치한 장소(중복 제외)
question_en: All places where any celestial bird is transitively located
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?p WHERE { ?bird a pl:CelestialBird ; pl:locatedIn+ ?p . }
gold_triples: 4 birds in JeweledTree, JeweledTree in Sukhavati

question_ko: 산스크리트 이름이 명시된 모든 존재의 수
question_en: Count of all entities with sanskritName
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?b) AS ?n) WHERE { ?b pl:sanskritName ?name . }

question_ko: 부처 X와 부처 X의 협시 보살 Y, Y가 거주하는 장소 모두 매칭
question_en: Match triples of (Buddha X, attendant bodhisattva Y, place Y resides in)
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?buddha ?bs ?place WHERE { ?bs a pl:Bodhisattva ; pl:assists ?buddha ; pl:residesIn ?place . }

question_ko: 무량수경(T0360)에만 출현하고 다른 경전에는 없는 부처는?
question_en: Buddhas that appear ONLY in T0360 and nowhere else
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?b WHERE { ?b a pl:Buddha ; pl:appearsIn pl:T0360 . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?b pl:appearsIn pl:T0366 } FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?b pl:appearsIn pl:T0365 } }
gold_answer_ko: 없음 (모든 부처는 T0366 또는 T0365에도 출현)

question_ko: 법장비구의 preceding-stage 관계가 가리키는 존재의 클래스
question_en: What class is the precedingStage target of Dharmākara?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?cls WHERE { pl:Dharmakara pl:precedingStage ?b . ?b a ?cls . FILTER(?cls != pl:Being) }

question_ko: 보배누각의 층수와 보배연못의 연꽃 색상 수의 합
question_en: Sum of tower stories and lotus colours in the pond
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT (?stories + ?colors AS ?total) WHERE { pl:JeweledTower_Canonical pl:storyCount ?stories . { SELECT (COUNT(?c) AS ?colors) WHERE { pl:LotusPond_Canonical pl:hasColor ?c . } } }

question_ko: hasContemplation 관계로 16관법의 대상이 명시된 존재의 수
question_en: Number of beings explicitly linked via hasContemplation to a contemplation
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?b) AS ?n) WHERE { ?b pl:hasContemplation ?c . }

question_en: How many vows did Śakra make?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT (COUNT(?v) AS ?n) WHERE { pl:Sakra pl:hasVow ?v . }
gold_answer_ko: 0 — 제석천은 Deva이며 본 온톨로지에는 Buddha의 본원만 모델링됨. hasVow의 도메인은 Buddha.
gold_answer_en: 0 — Śakra is a Deva; only Buddha vows are modelled (hasVow has domain pl:Buddha).
trap_note: LLMs may conflate 'vows' as a general buddhist concept applicable to any being. The KG correctly restricts hasVow to Buddha.

question_en: Which śrāvaka disciples does Amitābha teach?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?s WHERE { pl:Amitabha pl:teaches ?s . ?s a pl:Sravaka . }
gold_answer_ko: 없음 — 아미타불은 극락에 거주하며 본 온톨로지의 사리불·아난 등 성문은 사바세계에서 석가모니불에게 가르침을 받음.
gold_answer_en: None — Amitābha resides in Sukhāvatī; the named śrāvakas in this KG are taught by Śākyamuni in the Sahā world.
trap_note: LLMs may assume any buddha teaches śrāvakas. In this dataset, śrāvaka relationships exist only with Śākyamuni.

question_en: Who is the subject of the 18th contemplation?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT ?being WHERE { ?being pl:hasContemplation ?c . ?c pl:contemplationOrder 18 . }
gold_answer_ko: 없음 — 관무량수경(T0365)에는 16관법만 있음. 18번째 관법은 존재하지 않음.
gold_answer_en: None — T0365 has exactly 16 contemplations; there is no 18th.
trap_note: LLMs may confabulate by analogy with the 48 vows (large round numbers feel familiar) or may not distinguish 16 from 18. The KG cardinality is exactly 16.

question_en: How many vows did the Peacock make?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX pl: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/pure_land#>
SELECT (COUNT(?v) AS ?n) WHERE { pl:Peacock pl:hasVow ?v . }
gold_answer_ko: 0 — 공작은 CelestialBird (Sentient의 하위)이며 본원의 주체가 될 수 없음 (hasVow의 도메인은 Buddha).
gold_answer_en: 0 — Peacock is a CelestialBird (a Sentient being), not a Buddha; hasVow has domain pl:Buddha.
trap_note: Tests whether the LLM respects class-based domain restrictions on properties.
